name: granite
title: Granite
description: Search, browse, and ask your Granite document vault.
author: Shpigford

commands.name: search-vault
commands.title: Search Vault
commands.subtitle: Granite
commands.description: Search your Granite documents and open them.

commands.name: ask-vault
commands.title: Ask Vault
commands.subtitle: Granite
commands.description: Ask a question across your vault and get a synthesized answer with sources.

commands.name: browse-documents
commands.title: Browse Documents
commands.subtitle: Granite
commands.description: Browse your vault's documents, oldest first, loaded as you scroll.

tools.name: search-vault
tools.title: Search Vault
tools.description: Search the user's Granite document vault and return ranked matches (title, type, dates, a short snippet, linked entities). Use this to FIND documents; then call get-document for their full field values. Returns metadata only.

tools.name: list-documents
tools.title: List Documents
tools.description: List documents in the vault, oldest first, as metadata. Cursor-paginated: the response carries next_cursor and has_more — pass cursor to get the next page. Prefer search-vault when you know what you want; use this to browse.

tools.name: get-document
tools.title: Get Document
tools.description: Fetch one document by id with its full structured fields — title, type, dates, extracted field values, linked entities and collections. Set include_full_text to also return the raw OCR/body text (larger payload; only when you need verbatim contents).

tools.name: ask-vault
tools.title: Ask Vault
tools.description: Ask a natural-language question across the whole vault and get a synthesized answer with citations to source documents. Requires the vault:ask token scope. Use get-document to read any cited document in full.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Your gra_live_… Personal Access Token from Granite → Settings → Developer → Access tokens. Treat it like a password.

preferences.name: apiBase
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: Override only for development. Defaults to the public Granite Agent API.
